title: Government response to draft Statement of Strategic Priorities for online safety
body: "We have set out a summary of the responses received followed by the government response. This includes, where relevant, how the government has amended the draft statement in light of the responses.  The government ran a statutory consultation with a targeted group of online safety stakeholders on the draft Statement of Strategic Priorities for online safety between 20 November 2024 and 10 January 2025.  The consultation sought views from respondents on two open questions. We received 21 responses from civil society and industry stakeholders.  "
